title: lupinus sellulus subsp. sellulus
intro: Lupinus sellulus subsp. sellulus, also known as the Bigberry lupine, is a perennial plant species belonging to the lupine family. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its alkaloids, including sparteine, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Bigberry lupine include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Bigberry lupine can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate respiratory issues.
